data.title: Add multi-model selection UI
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `backend`

**Description:**
Allow users to choose between different AI models (Llama, GPT, Claude, etc.) from the UI.

**Proposed Solution:**
Add model selection dropdown in the chat interface with support for multiple LLM providers.

**Features:**

* Model dropdown in UI (GPT-4, Claude, Llama, etc.)
* Display model capabilities (context window, speed, cost)
* Remember user's model preference
* Support for provider-specific parameters (temperature, top_p)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Users can select from available models
- [ ] Selection persists across sessions
- [ ] Backend routes to correct provider
- [ ] Display model info/capabilities
- [ ] Handle provider-specific features

**Technical Considerations:**

* Extend LLM provider abstraction
* Add model registry/configuration
* Update frontend with model selector
* Store preference in localStorage or user profile
* Add model-specific parameter controls

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Medium** (UI component, backend routing logic, configuration management)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium** (provider abstraction, model-specific handling, clean architecture needed)
* 💎 Value: **Medium-High** (increases flexibility, allows users to optimize for speed/cost/quality)
